},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Typography,{id:"skills",variant:"h2",my:4,children:"Skills"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Box,{sx:{display:'flex',justifyContent:'center'},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Grid,{container:true,spacing:4,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Grid,{item:true,xs:12,sm:6,md:4,lg:3,children:gridItem('Python',python_img)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Grid,{item:true,xs:12,sm:6,md:4,lg:3,children:gridItem('Flask',flask_img)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Grid,{item:true,xs:12,sm:6,md:4,lg:3,children:gridItem('NumPy',numpy_img)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Grid,{item:true,xs:12,sm:6,md:4,lg:3,children:gridItem('Pandas',pandas_img)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Grid,{item:true,xs:12,sm:6,md:4,lg:3,children:gridItem('JavaScript',javascript_img)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Grid,{item:true,xs:12,sm:6,md:4,lg:3,children:gridItem('NodeJS',node_img)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Grid,{item:true,xs:12,sm:6,md:4,lg:3,children:gridItem('React',react_img)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Grid,{item:true,xs:12,sm:6,md:4,lg:3,children:gridItem('Material UI',mui_img)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Grid,{item:true,xs:12,sm:6,md:4,lg:3,children:gridItem('HTML5',html_img)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Grid,{item:true,xs:12,sm:6,md:4,lg:3,children:gridItem('CSS3',css_img)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Grid,{item:true,xs:12,sm:6,md:4,lg:3,children:gridItem('GitHub',github_img)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Grid,{item:true,xs:12,sm:6,md:4,lg:3,children:gridItem('Render',render_img)})]})})]});}export default Skills;
